across.clue: System where nobles maintained troops in exchange for land
across.hint: The Mughal military-administrative system ranking nobles and their responsibilities.

across.clue: Battle in 1565 that destroyed the Vijayanagara city

across.clue: Epic poem written by Krishnadevaraya in Telugu

across.clue: Ahom commander who defeated Mughals at Saraighat
across.hint: This brilliant Ahom general led the defense against Mughal invasion in Assam.

across.clue: Rajput warrior queen of the Garha kingdom
across.hint: A brave queen who fought against Mughal forces to protect her kingdom.

down.clue: Tax imposed on non-Muslims under the Sultanate
down.hint: A religious tax levied on non-Muslim subjects in medieval Islamic kingdoms.
